message:
fix(codegen): Fix builder vs self.emit mixing for inline blocks

Two fixes for cases where ZigBuilder output buffer was used instead of
NativeCodegen output buffer, causing code to go to wrong destination:

1. list.zig lambda append: Changed b2.emitInlineBlockStart/End to
   self.emitInlineBlockStart/End so inline block syntax goes to same
   output buffer as surrounding code. This fixes:
   `try obj.append(allocator, const x = ...; break :label ...)`
   → `try obj.append(allocator, (__label: { const x = ...; break :label ...; }))`

2. calls.zig kwarg_err: Removed extra `(` and `)` around inline block.
   emitInlineBlockStart already emits `(__label: { ` and
   emitInlineBlockEnd already emits `})`, so the extra parens were
   creating invalid syntax like `((__label: { ... }))`.
